inputs.label: Volume (mL)
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the solution in milliliters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of the solution in milliliters.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total de la solution en millilitres.

inputs.label: Target concentration (g/100mL)
inputs.businessContext: Desired sodium chloride concentration for isotonicity (typically 0.9% w/v).

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired sodium chloride concentration for isotonicity (typically 0.9% w/v).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzotoniklik için istenen sodyum klorür konsantrasyonu (tipik olarak %0.9 a/h)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Concentration en chlorure de sodium souhaitée pour l'isotonicité (généralement 0,9 % p/v).

inputs.label: Drug 1 amount (g)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the first active ingredient in grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the first active ingredient in grams.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des ersten Wirkstoffs in Gramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du premier principe actif en grammes.

inputs.label: Drug 1 E-value
inputs.businessContext: Sodium chloride equivalent of the first drug (g NaCl per g drug).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sodium chloride equivalent of the first drug (g NaCl per g drug).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci ilacın sodyum klorür eşdeğeri (g NaCl / g ilaç)
businessContext_i18n.de: Natriumchlorid-Äquivalent des ersten Wirkstoffs (g NaCl pro g Wirkstoff).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équivalent chlorure de sodium du premier médicament (g NaCl par g de médicament).

inputs.label: Drug 2 amount (g)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the second active ingredient in grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the second active ingredient in grams.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des zweiten Wirkstoffs in Gramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du deuxième principe actif en grammes.

inputs.label: Drug 2 E-value
inputs.businessContext: Sodium chloride equivalent of the second drug (g NaCl per g drug).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sodium chloride equivalent of the second drug (g NaCl per g drug).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci ilacın sodyum klorür eşdeğeri (g NaCl / g ilaç)
